def negative_blocking_sync_io_in_async():
    rule_id = "blocking_sync_io_in_async"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Synchronous network, subprocess, sleep, or file I/O calls made from async def functions."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
